chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 471 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 1921/2022 3.For hearing of main case 4.For orders on CMA 1922/2022 26-04-2023 None present for the petitioners. ***** None present for the petitioners; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which shows that the petitioners after filing instant petition have lost their interest. Accordingly, this petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
